title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 8–11, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It seems that I've become more gen- erous...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you can't settle this in five minutes...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Damn it!! We actually let this guy stay in our village for three years...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: With five minutes, we can settle this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Him!!! We can finish him off....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We can get up the slope!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right! He was no match for us just now!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No problem!! We can take care of him in five seconds!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: How dare you kick my Katanas....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So how are you going to repay me?

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
